zh.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble於1275年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾。她於大約1297年與Sir Walter de Upton在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kimble
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire and Middlesex): variant of   Kimball   or   Kemble  .
Americanized or varied spelling of German Gimbel (see Gimble ) or Kimbel .

variants.name: Kimball
meanings: habitational name from Great and Little Kimble (Buckinghamshire). The placename probably derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + belle ‘(bell-shaped) hill’.

variants.name: Kemble
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire and Middlesex): from the Middle English personal name Kinebald, Kenebald, Kembald (Old English Cynebeald, composed of the elements cyne ‘family, kin’ + beald ‘bold’). There seems also to have been some confusion with the habitational name Kimble .
It is also quite likely that this name has assimilated some instances of German   Kembel  .

variants.name: Kimbrell
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kimble   or   Kemble   with an intrusive -r-. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble was born in 1275, in Buckinghamshire, England. She married Sir Walter de Upton about 1297, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble est née en 1275, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Walter de Upton environ 1297, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble wurde 1275 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1297 in Buckinghamshire, England Sir Walter de Upton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble è nata il nel 1275 nel Buckinghamshire, England. Lei sposato Sir Walter de Upton circa 1297, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice Kimbleは1275年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた。約1297年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでSir Walter de Uptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble(은)는 1275년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1297년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Sir Walter de Upton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble nasceu em 1275, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter de Upton aproximadamente 1297, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble родилась в 1275 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter de Upton около 1297 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Avice Kimble nació en 1275, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir Walter de Upton aproximadamente 1297, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
